from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    """Test that all items are processed including the last one."""
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} items processed, got {len(result)}"
    assert result == [2, 4, 6], f"Expected [2, 4, 6], got {result}"
